◎简　　介  

　　Avery| a blogger with a string of disappointing Valentine's Days| is ready to give up on love when she meets handsome veterinarian Brendan. When Avery finds outBrendan blames his recent break up on her blog and is the one leaving her angry comments| she begins to question whether the bond they've began to build is a truelove story or yesterday's news.www.bttiantang.org
